description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Migrate hardcoded plaintext database credentials and configuration secrets from paygateway.properties to Azure Key Vault for secure, centralized secret management.
tasks.reason: The application stores sensitive credentials (database password, connection details) as plaintext in paygateway.properties. Moving these to Azure Key Vault eliminates the security risk of exposed credentials and enables managed identity-based secret retrieval.
tasks.requirements: Migrate all plaintext credentials and secrets in paygateway.properties (db.user, db.password) and any hardcoded secrets in Java source code to Azure Key Vault. Configure the application to retrieve secrets from Azure Key Vault at runtime using Managed Identity authentication instead of reading from local properties files or environment variables with plaintext values.

tasks.description: Scan all project dependencies for known CVEs and remediate any identified vulnerabilities to ensure the application is secure before deployment.
tasks.reason: The application uses legacy dependencies including Apache Struts 1.3.10 (released 2008, known CVEs) and other older libraries. Remediating CVEs before deployment ensures a secure baseline.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade vulnerable dependencies to the minimum patched version. If a CVE fix requires a major version upgrade, document the affected dependency, the current version, the upgraded major version, and the breaking change risk. Verify that the project builds and all tests pass after remediation.

tasks.description: Containerize and deploy the ZavaPayGateway application to Azure Container Apps using the existing Dockerfile.
tasks.reason: The user requested deployment to Azure. Azure Container Apps is the default target and aligns with the existing Dockerized setup (Tomcat 9 / JDK8 image).
tasks.requirements: Deploy the application to Azure Container Apps. Use the existing Dockerfile in the repository root. Provision new Azure Container Apps infrastructure using Bicep. Configure the container app with appropriate environment variables for Azure Key Vault endpoint and Managed Identity. Ensure the app is accessible via a public HTTPS endpoint.
